scope_items.text: Automated matching of settlement records between the core ledger and payments gateway using a unified transaction ID.
scope_items.rationale: Core pain point identified in as-is process; directly addresses OBJ-001.

scope_items.text: Real-time exception queue with automated routing to the responsible operations analyst.
Full audit trail capture for all reconciliation events, exportable for regulatory submission.
scope_items.rationale: Required for OBJ-003 and compliance sign-off.

scope_items.text: Front-office trade booking system integration — covered by a separate programme.
scope_items.rationale: Out of budget and timeline for this initiative; separate workstream already planned.

scope_items.text: Multi-currency FX netting — deferred to Phase 2.
scope_items.rationale: Complexity requires dedicated analysis; deferred to avoid scope creep.

scope_items.text: The core ledger system API will be available for real-time event streaming by project kick-off.
scope_items.rationale: IT Architecture has confirmed API readiness is on the Q2 roadmap.

scope_items.text: Operations team headcount remains stable during the transition period — no planned reorganisation.
scope_items.rationale: HR has confirmed no structural changes planned for FY2026.
